prompt: Replicate this EXACT typographic style from the reference image. Logo design on pure black background. Horizontal layout reading left to right. TWO ELEMENTS SIDE BY SIDE: ELEMENT 1 (LEFT, occupying 35% of canvas width): A yellow (#FAFA00) rectangular border frame, portrait proportions. Inside: solid black with the letters 'MM' in white, side by side on one line. The M letters must use the EXACT SAME wide blocky heavy typeface as shown in the reference image — extremely thick strokes, wide proportions where each letter is almost as wide as it is tall, minimal counter space, geometric construction. ELEMENT 2 (RIGHT, occupying 55% of canvas width): The word 'AGENCY.' in the same wide blocky heavy white typeface matching the reference image style. A small yellow (#FAFA00) square period at the end. Both elements vertically centered. The yellow frame only surrounds MM, not AGENCY. Sharp corners, no gradients, no shadows, flat vector design, ultra clean.
